crypto_price.reasoning: Public market, no insider determines outcome

weather_event.reasoning: Natural process, no human insider knowledge

election_outcome.reasoning: Determined by millions of voters in real-time, publicly polled

sports_game_winner.reasoning: Determined on the field/court in real-time; minor insider edge from injuries and lineups

sports_mvp_award.reasoning: Voted by media/panel before announcement, but based on public performance; some voter preferences may leak

award_show_winner.reasoning: Winners chosen by voters/academy weeks before ceremony; accounting firms know; envelopes prepared in advance

box_office_performance.reasoning: Opening weekend estimates circulate among industry insiders; tracking services have early data

music_chart_position.reasoning: Streaming and sales data is tracked in real-time by industry; chart positions known hours before official release

reality_tv_elimination.reasoning: Episodes are pre-recorded; cast, crew, and producers know outcomes weeks/months before broadcast

tv_show_plot_outcome.reasoning: Writers, actors, and production crew know plot outcomes before episodes air

product_launch.reasoning: Company employees and partners know features/dates weeks or months before public announcement

halftime_show.reasoning: Performers, crew, producers, and NFL all know the setlist and guests; large information chain with many people involved

super_bowl_ads.reasoning: Ad buyers, agencies, and network sales teams all know which ads will air well in advance; contracts signed months ahead

regulatory_ruling.reasoning: Regulators, their staff, and sometimes lobbied parties know rulings before public announcement; massive financial incentive

corporate_earnings.reasoning: Company insiders know financial results before earnings calls; SEC regulations exist but leaks happen

person_of_year.reasoning: Editorial board decides weeks before announcement; small group of journalists and editors know

netflix_ranking.reasoning: Netflix internal teams have real-time viewership data; rankings known before weekly public release

rotten_tomatoes_score.reasoning: Critics and aggregation staff see scores accumulate before public release; early screenings inform predictions

tiktok_ban.reasoning: Government officials and their staff know regulatory decisions before public announcement; legal teams involved

eurovision.reasoning: Live voting event, but jury votes (50% of score) are cast before broadcast; rehearsal performances seen by jury and press
